title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
